name: Australian Shrimp on the Barbie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Minced fresh herbs (parsley, thyme, and cilantro)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first eight ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Mix in the shrimp.
3. Marinate at room temperature for 1 hour or in the refrigerator for 5 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Prepare the barbecue with medium hot coals.
5. Thread the shrimp onto narrow skewers.
6. Grill until just opaque, about 2 minutes per side.
7. Line a platter with spinach leaves and lemon slices.
8. Arrange the skewers on the platter.
9. Garnish with lemon and serve. Makes 8 servings.
